runs.scoreCapReason: capped at 1.5/5 — the system was never verified running (/health never returned 2xx); a deep score requires a live boot

categories.name: Functional Suitability / Correctness
notes: SEMI: pass --base-url (the harness does) to run the live contract oracle that measures real per-endpoint correctness.

metrics.name: mutation-config
metrics.note: optional per the task — absence is not penalized

metrics.name: schemathesis
metrics.target: API conforms to its OpenAPI contract (Schemathesis)
metrics.note: no OpenAPI document served (tried /openapi/v1.json, /swagger/v1/swagger.json, …) — not scored

categories.name: Architecture & Design
notes: PROXY: layering and overengineering are scored automatically from Roslyn dependency-direction, class-size and single-implementation-interface metrics. NDepend/SonarQube can deepen this.

metrics.name: dependency-direction
metrics.target: domain does not reference infrastructure (Roslyn usings)

metrics.name: overengineering-proxy
metrics.note: 1/1 single-implementation interfaces — normal DIP ports (repository/UoW/publisher); informational, not scored

categories.name: REST API Design
notes: No static OpenAPI file found (spec is likely generated at runtime); run --deep to generate and lint it.
SEMI: pass --base-url (the harness does) to assert live status codes / Location / Problem Details / pagination.

metrics.name: openapi-populated
metrics.note: no OpenAPI document served — not scored

categories.name: Persistence & Database
notes: PROXY: schema shape (3NF heuristics, FKs, indexes, concurrency) is scored automatically from Roslyn; N+1 / seq-scan signals use the live DB in --deep (pg_stat_statements/EXPLAIN).

categories.name: Messaging
notes: Deep messaging checks (publish-duplicate -> single effect; kill consumer mid-process; Schema Registry compatibility) require a Kafka container and the app running.

categories.name: Security
notes: PROXY: scored automatically from SAST/DAST tool output and the live BOLA oracle scenario (user A vs resource of B) in --deep.

metrics.name: pci-pan
metrics.target: no PAN (Luhn-valid card) embedded in code/config

metrics.name: authz
metrics.note: out of scope — absence is not a finding

metrics.name: sast
metrics.note: tool 'semgrep' not installed — install: pip install semgrep

categories.name: Resilience & Error Handling
notes: Real fault injection (Toxiproxy) and recovery measurement need --deep + a running container.

metrics.name: mutation-tool
metrics.note: optional per the task — absence is not penalized

categories.name: Performance & Scalability
notes: SEMI: the latency/throughput score needs a target SLO (oracle) and a load test against the running API (k6, set up by the docker-compose harness).

metrics.name: pinning
metrics.target: pinned dependencies (lock file / global.json / Central Package Management)

metrics.name: outdated
metrics.note: tool 'dotnet-outdated' not installed — install: dotnet tool install -g dotnet-outdated-tool

categories.name: Documentation
notes: PROXY: README section/link presence, OpenAPI completeness and doc-comment coverage are scored automatically.

metrics.name: markdownlint
metrics.note: tool 'markdownlint' not installed — install: npm i -g markdownlint-cli
